title: Atlassian MCP customer profile
description: Per-customer configuration for required/default Jira fields not discoverable from the API.

project_overrides.description: Keyed by Jira project key (e.g. 'MYPROJ'). Lookups are case-insensitive.

issue_type_overrides.description: Keyed by issue type name (e.g. 'Story'). Lookups are case-insensitive.

required_fields.description: Field IDs (e.g. 'customfield_12345') that must be present on create.

default_fields.description: Field ID → default value. Value shape follows the Jira REST API for that field.
